title_en: Indiana Fever vs New York Liberty Recap
title_zh: Indiana Fever vs New York Liberty 回顾
summary_en: Focus on 3PT spacing and off-ball screens; how Fever responded to Liberty's high-post coordination and Spain PnR.
summary_zh: 围绕三分空间与无球掩护的对抗，解析 Fever 如何应对 Liberty 的高位协同与 Spain PnR。
highlights_en: Opening: Liberty used corner gravity; Fever contained drives via switches and rim protection.
Mid-game: Spain PnR frequently used; Fever anticipated and shrank weak side to respond.
Closing: Fever increased perimeter pressure and rotations, limited consecutive 3s, secured defensive boards.
highlights_zh: 开局阶段：Liberty 通过底角牵制拉开空间，Fever 以换防与护筐限制内突。
中段：Liberty 频繁使用 Spain PnR（高位挡拆+背掩护），Fever 通过提前沟通与弱侧收缩应对。
末节：Fever 加强外线压迫与协防轮转，遏制连续三分，控制防守篮板。
storyline_en: 1) Space probing with corner shooters; Fever kept intensity via traps/switches.
2) Spain PnR created mismatches; Fever pre-called coverages and recognized back screens.
3) Endgame: solid help and closeouts reduced open 3s; improved defensive rebounding.
storyline_zh: 1. 开局双方试探空间：Liberty 试图用底角射手牵制，Fever 以包夹和换防维持防守强度。
2. 中段攻防拉锯：Spain PnR 被多次打出，Fever 通过提前叫位与背掩护识别降低杀伤。
3. 终结阶段：Fever 稳定二次协防与外线追防，减少空位三分出手、提升防守篮板率。
tactics_en: Liberty Spain PnR: back screen to create mismatch; Fever countered via pre-communication and switching.
Fever off-ball screens: weak-side flare + pindown combos to create threes and cuts.
Defensive plan: top delay + weak-side wall to limit middle drives.
tactics_zh: Liberty Spain PnR：背掩护到位制造错位，Fever 通过提前沟通与换防化解。
Fever 无球掩护：弱侧 flare + pindown 结合，创造外线机会与切入通道。
防守策略：顶弧延阻 + 弱侧包线，限制持球人中路推进。

spainPnRSequences.result_zh: 延阻成功，外线投篮不中
换防到位，背掩护被识别

spainPnRSequences.result_en: Weak-side help on time, cut denied
spainPnRSequences.result_zh: 弱侧补位及时，切入被封堵
